# ReelShelf Mobile — Design System

> Reference document for the mobile design system established in Phase 4.
> All token values live in `constants/theme.ts` and `constants/motion.ts`.
> Update this file whenever tokens change — do not let it drift from the code.

---

## Principles

**Editorial, not algorithmic.** Every section should feel curated by a thoughtful editor, not generated by an engagement algorithm. Headings are declarative ("Trending Today — what's resonating right now") rather than imperative ("You should watch…").

**Breathing room as a design element.** Every screen breathes. Major sections are separated by `RS.spacing.xxl` (56px). The `gap: RS.spacing.xxl` in the Home screen `contentContainerStyle` is not padding — it is intentional editorial whitespace.

**Quiet confidence.** Motion is present but never draws attention to itself. Poster lift is 4% compression, not a dramatic zoom. Header fade reaches 82% opacity at most — still readable, just retreating gracefully.

**UI thread first.** All scroll-linked effects (`FadingHeader`) and press animations (`AnimatedPosterCard`) run on the UI thread via Reanimated shared values. JS-thread animation is reserved for mount-only effects (`RevealOnMount`) where frame-drop risk is zero.

---

## Color Palette

All tokens in `RS.colors` (`constants/theme.ts`).

| Token              | Hex / RGBA                    | Usage                                              |
|--------------------|-------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| `base`             | `#07070b`                     | Screen backgrounds, `SafeAreaView` fill            |
| `card`             | `#0d0d14`                     | Card surfaces, chips, modals                       |
| `elevated`         | `#131320`                     | Elevated surfaces, skeleton fills                  |
| `accent`           | `#1d9e75`                     | Primary CTA buttons, active chip highlight, progress bar |
| `border`           | `rgba(255,255,255,0.08)`      | Default card borders, chip borders                 |
| `borderStrong`     | `rgba(255,255,255,0.18)`      | Hovered/active borders (mirrors `--rs-border-strong`) |
| `textPrimary`      | `rgba(255,255,255,0.92)`      | All primary heading and body text                  |
| `textSecondary`    | `rgba(255,255,255,0.55)`      | Subtitles, metadata, icon fills                    |
| `textMuted`        | `rgba(255,255,255,0.32)`      | Placeholder text, attribution, timestamps          |
| `gold`             | `#fbbf24`                     | Ranked badges (Tailwind amber-400)                 |
| `goldMuted`        | `rgba(251,191,36,0.15)`       | Gold badge backgrounds                             |
| `accentGlow`       | `rgba(29,158,117,0.10)`       | Subtle green tint overlay (reserved)               |

### Gradient Surfaces

Poster cards use `expo-linear-gradient` overlays rather than solid fills:

- **Poster overlay** (legibility): `['transparent', 'rgba(0,0,0,0.82)']`, `start={x:0,y:0.45}` to `end={x:0,y:1}`
- **Collection card overlay**: `['transparent', 'rgba(0,0,0,0.88)']`, `start={x:0,y:0.35}` to `end={x:0,y:1}`
- **Poster fallback bg**: `['#1a1a2a', '#0c0c14']`, diagonal `start={x:0,y:0}` to `end={x:1,y:1}`

---

## Typography Scale

Font families in `Fonts` (`constants/theme.ts`, via `Platform.select`):
- `Fonts.serif` → `'ui-serif'` (iOS: New York), `'serif'` (Android/default)
- `Fonts.sans` → `'system-ui'` (iOS: San Francisco), `'normal'` (Android)
- `Fonts.rounded` → `'ui-rounded'` (iOS), `'normal'` (Android)

All tokens in `RS.typography`.

| Token        | Size (px) | Weight | Family | Line-height | Usage                                          |
|--------------|-----------|--------|--------|-------------|------------------------------------------------|
| `display`    | 32        | 800    | serif  | 40          | Hero heading ("Discover your next story.")     |
| `heading`    | 20        | 700    | sans   | auto        | Section headers (Trending Today, Collections)  |
| `subheading` | 15        | 400    | sans   | 20–22       | Section subtitles, hero sub-copy               |
| `body`       | 14        | 400    | sans   | 20          | Card descriptions, button labels               |
| `caption`    | 11        | 600    | sans   | 14          | Badge labels, chips, year metadata             |
| `overline`   | 10        | 700    | sans   | —           | Uppercase pre-labels (future use)              |

**Rule:** `display` always uses `fontFamily: Fonts?.serif`. All other sizes use the default (sans) unless specifically a design choice.

---

## Spacing Scale

All tokens in `RS.spacing`.

| Token  | Value (px) | Usage                                                   |
|--------|------------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| `xs`   | 4          | Badge padding, tight internal gaps                      |
| `sm`   | 8          | Between chips, badge pill margins, button internals     |
| `md`   | 16         | Standard horizontal screen padding, card padding        |
| `lg`   | 24         | Section internal gap (header to carousel)               |
| `xl`   | 40         | Screen bottom padding                                   |
| `xxl`  | 56         | Gap between major Home screen sections (editorial air)  |

**Rule:** Use `xxl` only for major section-to-section spacing in the Home ScrollView's `contentContainerStyle`. Internal spacing within a section uses `lg` or smaller.

---

## Motion Tokens

All tokens in `constants/motion.ts`. Easing functions are constructed at use-site via `Easing.bezier(…Motion.bezier.enter)` from `react-native-reanimated`.

### Durations

| Token    | Value (ms) | Usage                                         |
|----------|------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `fast`   | 150        | Chip press feedback, badge transitions        |
| `medium` | 220        | Card press spring (AnimatedPosterCard)        |
| `slow`   | 380        | Section entrance fade (RevealOnMount)         |

### Easing

| Name    | Bezier                      | Usage                                   |
|---------|-----------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| `enter` | `cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)` | All entrance animations (soft ease-out) |

In practice: `RevealOnMount` uses `Easing.out(Easing.ease)` from Reanimated (equivalent for cross-platform robustness).

### Lift Values (`Motion.lift`)

| Token         | Value | Usage                                                      |
|---------------|-------|------------------------------------------------------------|
| `scaleActive` | 0.96  | Poster card scale on press-in (mirrors web `scale(0.99)`)  |

Spring config for press-in: `{ damping: 18, stiffness: 240, mass: 0.8 }`  
Spring config for press-out: `{ damping: 14, stiffness: 180, mass: 0.8 }`

### Header Fade (`Motion.header`)

| Token              | Value | Usage                                         |
|--------------------|-------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `fadeScrollStart`  | 0 px  | Full opacity at scroll position 0             |
| `fadeScrollEnd`    | 70 px | Minimum opacity reached at 70px scroll        |
| `minOpacity`       | 0.82  | Lowest opacity — header stays glanceable      |
| `translateYOffset` | −4 px | Subtle upward drift as header recedes         |

### Section Entrance (`Motion.section`)

| Token       | Value  | Usage                                          |
|-------------|--------|------------------------------------------------|
| `translateY`| 14 px  | Initial downward offset before reveal          |
| `duration`  | 380 ms | Entrance animation duration                   |

Stagger delays used in Home screen (ms): 0 · 80 · 160 · 240 · 320 · 400

---

## Motion Primitives

All in `reelshelf-mobile/components/`.

### `AnimatedPosterCard`

- **Wraps:** `PosterCard`
- **Effect:** Press-lift via `withSpring` on the UI thread. Scale compresses to 0.96 on press-in, springs back to 1.0 on press-out.
- **Use in:** Every `FlatList` carousel's `renderItem` instead of bare `PosterCard`.
- **Note:** `onPress` prop is forwarded to `Pressable` — wire navigation in Phase 5.

### `FadingHeader`

- **Wraps:** `Header`
- **Effect:** `opacity` and `translateY` interpolated from `scrollY` (`SharedValue<number>`). UI-thread only.
- **Requires:** Parent must create `scrollRef = useAnimatedRef<Animated.ScrollView>()` and `scrollY = useScrollViewOffset(scrollRef)`, then use `<Animated.ScrollView ref={scrollRef}>`.
- **Use in:** Home screen only. Other tabs use `Header` directly (if/when they get a header).

### `RevealOnMount`

- **Wraps:** any `children`
- **Effect:** Fade (opacity 0→1) + upward translate (14px→0) on component mount, with optional `delay` prop for staggering.
- **Use in:** Wrap each major section in Home screen's ScrollView. Use incremental `delay` values (80ms steps).
- **Accessibility note:** If `AccessibilityInfo.isReduceMotionEnabled` becomes relevant in Phase 5, this component is the right place to check and skip animation.

---

## Card Sizes

All in `RS.card`.

| Token          | Value  | Usage                                       |
|----------------|--------|---------------------------------------------|
| `posterWidth`  | 100 px | Standard poster card width (2:3 ratio)      |
| `posterHeight` | 150 px | Standard poster card height                 |
| `featWidth`    | 200 px | Featured carousel card width                |
| `featHeight`   | 280 px | Featured carousel card height               |
| `cwThumbWidth` | 128 px | Continue-watching thumbnail width           |
| `cwHeight`     | 96 px  | Continue-watching card min-height           |
| `radius`       | 10 px  | All card border-radius (mirrors `--rs-radius-card`) |

---

## Phase 4+ Guidelines

- **Director Spotlight, One Hidden Gem, Collection of the Week, Book Worth Your Weekend** — these section names reference the editorial *tone and voice* only. They are **not** built components in Phase 4. If they become real sections in a future phase, they must have real data backing and live API integration — do not mock them with static data.
- All new sections go through the same motion treatment: wrap in `RevealOnMount`, render `AnimatedPosterCard` in their carousels.
- When Phase 5 wires navigation, pass `onPress={() => router.push(...)}` to `AnimatedPosterCard` — no architecture changes needed.
- If Supabase-backed personalization replaces the static `becauseYouLoved` list, the `BecauseYouLovedSection` title prop changes from `"Babylon"` to the user's most-recently-loved title — the component itself is ready.
